title: houssayanthus incanus
intro: Houssayanthus incanus, also known as "yerba de gato," is a plant species native to South America, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Houssayanthus incanus include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Houssayanthus incanus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of uses in folk medicine.
